svg.text: Corporate charge accounts — customers dine, charges post to their account, invoiced monthly. Common for hotel F&B, corporate catering, club memberships.
1. Server selects "House Account" as payment method
2. Search account by name or account number
4. If order > $500 → manager approval popup required
5. Charge posts to account immediately on approval
7. Customer emailed receipt (optional per account setting)
Credit check: balance + order ≤ credit_limit → else BLOCK
pos_house_accounts: id, venue_id, company_name, billing_email, credit_limit_cents, balance_cents, price_level_id, tax_exempt_account_id, billing_cycle, payment_terms_days
pos_house_account_charges: charge_id, account_id, order_id, amount_cents, purchaser_name, ts
pos_invoices: invoice_id, account_id, period_start, period_end, total_cents, status (draft | sent | paid | overdue)
pos_invoice_payments: payment_id, invoice_id, method, reference, amount_cents, recorded_at
Register: pos_payments.method = 'house_account', house_account_id FK. Credit check: balance + order_amount <= credit_limit else BLOCK.
Monthly cron: generate invoices on billing_day, email via SendGrid, update status. Overdue: auto-flag at payment_terms_days + 1.
